kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Creates an HTTP session for ParaBank API

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts path_url=/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

Gets a list of accounts for a customer ID

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.doc: Creates a new account for the customer via API

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
Loads target environment and fetch active account IDs

kw.name: Verify Response Code
Log To Console

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verify newly created account exists in customer accounts list
